gist.headline: Mudding around
gist.blurb: InfiniteMud just dropped into the ecosystem! Dive into a procedurally generated, persistent world where you can build, explore, and shape the landscape.
gist.summary: Added InfiniteMud, a procedurally generated persistent world game, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Players can now explore and build in a scalable, user-created navigable space powered by Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'InfiniteMud', a procedurally generated world/MUD game. Visuals should include mud, building blocks, and the bee mascot playing or building in the mud. A retro terminal showing a MUD interface fits the theme perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny construction hardhat, happily building a small castle out of chunky pixelated mud blocks. A retro computer monitor nearby displays a glowing text-based MUD interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
